quote: Her work in pre-prosthetic preparation and gait re-education stood out. Thorough assessments and realistic, motivating goals for every patient.
longQuote: Julia's work in amputee and prosthetic rehabilitation stood out. Her pre- and post-prosthetic gait re-education was thorough, and she set realistic, motivating goals for every patient. A genuine specialist in limb-loss recovery.
